title: APPLE AirTag Bluetooth Tracker
subtitle: APPLE AirTag Bluetooth Tracker
overview: Losing your keys or backpack is a pain, but it doesn't have to be. This clever little Apple AirTag can be attached to any of your important items and tracked using the Find My app. Precision Finding narrows your search by pointing you in the right direction of your lost item. Left your bag on the train? The Find My network uses millions of Apple devices around the world to help you track it down. It's like having your own personal search party. You won't have to worry about privacy either. The location and user data is encrypted, so all your personal details stay safe and secure.Good to know- It instantly connects to your iPhone or iPad (IOS 14.5 or later) thanks to one-tap setup - just give your AirTag a name and attach it to your item- You can play a sound on the built-in speaker to help you find your item – handy if your keys are hiding under the sofa- The battery lasts for over a year and is easy to replace- It has an IP67 water resistance rating, so there's nothing to worry about
key_features: Locate lost items using your iPhone or iPad

specs.value: iPhone and iPod touch models with iOS 14.5 or later, iPad models with iPadOS 14.5 or later
Bluetooth, Apple-designed U1 chip for Ultra Wideband and Precision Finding, NFC tap for Lost Mode
Apple AirTag Bluetooth Tracker, CR2032 coin cell battery (installed), Documentation
31.9 x x 31.9 x 8 mm (H x W x D)

title: APPLE AirTag (2nd Generation) Bluetooth Tracker - Pack of 4
subtitle: APPLE AirTag (2nd Generation)
overview: Finding your stuff just got a whole lot easier with the 2nd generation Apple AirTag. Pop one on your keys or slip one in your bag and you'll be able to track your belongings. Misplaced something at home? Just ping the AirTag from the Find My app or ask Siri. Precision Finding narrows your search by pointing you in the right direction, helping you zero in on your lost item. The boosted speaker means you can hear it from up to twice the distance, so no more ransacking the sofa cushions. Left your bag on the train? The Find My network uses millions of Apple devices around the world to help you track it down. It's like having your own personal search party.Good to know- Share tracking with up to five people so the whole family can keep tabs on their essentials- Switch on Lost Mode get an alert the moment your AirTag is spotted by the network- Location and user data are encrypted, so all your personal details stay safe and secure- The battery lasts over a year, and when it runs low, you can
key_features: Locate lost items using your iPhone or iPad
